call_sequence: UNKNOWN — selector inventory required before call sequence can be specified
attacker_path_hypothesis.expected_gain: UNKNOWN — depends on selector surface; upper bound is ~$28.6M in stablecoin/token balance if a public sweep or withdraw path exists without access control
preconditions: Contract holds ~$28.6M in stablecoins or known ERC-20 assets confirmed by on-chain balance query
At least one public selector exists that transfers, withdraws, redeems, or sweeps tokens
No caller whitelist, ownership check, or merkle proof guards that selector

live_context_required.name: verification_and_source
live_context_required.reason: verified_source is null — the pipeline does not yet know whether source is available on BSCScan. Source code or a decompiled ABI is required before any selector or access-control analysis is possible.

live_context_required.command_or_source:
cast storage 0x462b30a53c8552035506e82ce7b6a6c418b0477f 0x360894a13ba1a3210667c828492db98dca3e2076 --rpc-url <BSC_RPC>  # EIP-1967 impl slot
cast storage 0x462b30a53c8552035506e82ce7b6a6c418b0477f 0xb53127684a568b3173ae13b9f8a6016f243e3b42 --rpc-url <BSC_RPC>  # EIP-1967 admin slot
live_context_required.name: proxy_slot_check
live_context_required.reason: No proxy/admin state is known. If this is an EIP-1967 or EIP-897 proxy, the implementation address determines the actual callable surface and may differ from any verified stub.

live_context_required.name: selectors_from_calldata
live_context_required.reason: No selectors have been recovered. Transaction calldata is the only way to enumerate public entry points on an unverified or partially verified contract. Value-moving selectors (withdraw, claim, sweep, redeem, migrate) must be identified before any exploit hypothesis can be formed.

live_context_required.name: token_balance_breakdown
live_context_required.reason: Tags confirm stablecoin_balance and known_asset_balance but do not identify which tokens or amounts. The exact token composition determines whether the value is user-deposited principal (extractable) or protocol-owned subsidy (not in scope).

live_context_required.name: deployer_and_funding_trace
live_context_required.reason: deployer_address is empty. Without the deployer, closed-project cluster matching, funding-source attribution, and ownership/admin role identification are all blocked.

live_context_required.name: recent_internal_transactions
live_context_required.reason: Internal transactions reveal delegatecall patterns, value routing, and whether the contract forwards calls to an implementation — critical for proxy and router surface identification.

expected_assertions: BLOCKED — requires selector inventory from live context step above
setup: Fork BSC mainnet at current block
Enumerate all public selectors from recovered calldata or decompiled bytecode
transaction_sequence: BLOCKED — requires selector inventory from live context step above

source_or_selector_basis.evidence: Transaction calldata has not been parsed; verified_source is null; no ABI is available.
source_or_selector_basis.why_it_matters: Without at least one confirmed public selector that moves value, no exploit path can be constructed or rejected. This is the primary blocker for advancing beyond NEEDS_LIVE_CONTEXT.

suspected_exploit_families: missing access control on value-moving functions
unauthorized withdrawal, redeem, unstake, claim, liquidate, release, sweep, or migrate
proxy, implementation, or storage mismatch that exposes live funds
why_this_target_matters: Fresh BSC contract holding ~$28.6M in stablecoins and known assets with unknown verification status, no recovered selectors, no deployer attribution, and no protocol identity. The combination of hidden_high_value_contract, unknown_verification_status, and stablecoin_balance at this scale is a high-priority recon surface: if the contract is unverified or a proxy with public value-moving selectors, an unprivileged caller may be able to sweep or withdraw without entitlement checks.
